label: Django
description: Full-stack web framework with batteries included.

phases.label: Django Basics
phases.description: Project setup, apps, and the request/response cycle.

topics.label: Project Setup
topics.description: django-admin startproject, startapp, settings.py, and manage.py. Understand Django's project structure.

topics.label: URLs & Views
topics.description: URL routing with urlpatterns and path(). Function-based views (FBVs) and HttpResponse.

topics.label: Templates
topics.description: Django template language — variables, tags, filters, template inheritance with {% extends %}.

topics.label: Static Files
topics.description: Serve CSS, JS, and images with {% static %}. STATICFILES_DIRS and collectstatic.

topics.label: Settings & Configuration
topics.description: DEBUG, ALLOWED_HOSTS, INSTALLED_APPS, DATABASES. Environment-based config with django-environ.

topics.label: Models
topics.description: Define models with CharField, IntegerField, ForeignKey, ManyToManyField. Models map to database tables.

topics.label: Migrations
topics.description: makemigrations and migrate. Django tracks schema changes automatically.

topics.label: QuerySet API
topics.description: filter, exclude, annotate, aggregate, select_related, prefetch_related. Lazy evaluation.

topics.label: Admin Site
topics.description: Register models with admin.site.register. Customize with ModelAdmin, list_display, search_fields.

topics.label: Model Relationships
topics.description: ForeignKey, OneToOneField, ManyToManyField. Understand forward and reverse lookups.

topics.label: Managers & Custom QuerySets
topics.description: Custom managers for reusable query logic. Chain custom QuerySet methods.

phases.label: Forms, Auth & Middleware
phases.description: User input, authentication, and request processing.

topics.label: Forms
topics.description: Form and ModelForm classes. Validation, cleaning, and rendering.

topics.label: Authentication
topics.description: login, logout, User model, @login_required. Django's built-in auth system.

topics.label: Class-Based Views
topics.description: ListView, DetailView, CreateView, UpdateView, DeleteView. CBVs reduce boilerplate.

topics.label: Middleware
topics.description: Request/response processing pipeline. SecurityMiddleware, SessionMiddleware, custom middleware.

topics.label: Signals
topics.description: post_save, pre_delete, m2m_changed. Decouple app logic with signals.

topics.label: CSRF & Security
topics.description: CSRF protection, XSS prevention, clickjacking, and security settings.

topics.label: Django REST Framework
topics.description: Serializers, ViewSets, routers, and permissions. The standard for Django APIs.

topics.label: Serializers
topics.description: ModelSerializer, nested serializers, and validation. Transform querysets to JSON.

topics.label: Authentication & Permissions
topics.description: TokenAuth, SessionAuth, JWT, and custom permissions. Secure your API.

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: TestCase, Client, APIClient. Test views, models, and API endpoints.

topics.label: Pagination & Filtering
topics.description: PageNumberPagination, django-filter, SearchFilter, OrderingFilter.

topics.label: Caching & Performance
topics.description: Cache framework (Redis/Memcached), select_related, database indexes.

topics.label: Gunicorn & Nginx
topics.description: Deploy with Gunicorn WSGI server behind Nginx reverse proxy.

topics.label: Docker
topics.description: Containerize Django with Dockerfile and docker-compose.

topics.label: Environment Variables
topics.description: django-environ or python-decouple for secrets. Never commit .env files.

topics.label: Celery (Background Tasks)
topics.description: Async task processing with Celery and Redis/RabbitMQ.

topics.label: Deployment Checklist
topics.description: python manage.py check --deploy. Security headers, HTTPS, and production settings.
